data.title: Charles Hoskinson Outlines the Future of Cardano’s Hydra… and it’s Interesting
data.description:

data.title: PENGU Price Falls as Pudgy Penguins Burn Over $150 Million in Solana Tokens
data.description:
Pudgy Penguins burned unclaimed Solana airdrop tokens earlier than originally planned, and PENGU's price dipped lower afterwards.
source: https://decrypt.co/304610/pengu-falls-pudgy-penguins-burn-150-million-solana-tokens

data.title: Shiba Inu burn rate drops 50% — analyst predicts 300% surge by May
data.description:
Shiba Inu's burn rate has dropped by 50% in the past 24 hours, but analysts remain bullish, predicting a 300% surge by May if key technical patterns hold.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/shiba-inu-burn-rate-drops-50-but-analyst-predicts-300-surge-by-may

data.title: Bitcoin sell pressure could ramp up after 49.7K BTC onchain move
data.description:
Bitcoin price could drop under $94,000 again as crypto market sentiment turns negative for the first time since November 2024.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-sell-pressure-could-ramp-up-after-49-7-k-btc-onchain-move?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Public Citizen accuses Trump of ‘soliciting’ gifts with memecoin posts
data.description:
Though Donald Trump launched his memecoin before taking office, he has called on his social media followers to buy it after Jan. 20.

data.title: Ethereum, Solana and XRP Likely Forming Reversals, According to Crypto Analyst Jason Pizzino
data.description:
Cryptocurrency analyst and trader Jason Pizzino believes three top altcoins may be forming bullish reversals after the market’s correction.
